details: {"city_id": "Brussels", "alert_type": "terrorism_threat", "severity": "high", "summary": "Europol warned of elevated terrorism threat across EU amid ongoing Middle East conflict, with increased risks of terrorism and violent extremism linked to Iranian networks or extremist actors", "action": "update_score"}

{"city_id": "Berlin", "alert_type": "terrorism_threat", "severity": "high", "summary": "German authorities acknowledge changing threat situation amid Middle East conflict, with heightened security measures and terrorism concerns across Europe", "action": "update_score"}

{"city_id": "Paris", "alert_type": "terrorism_threat", "severity": "high", "summary": "France strengthened military security operation 'Op\u00e9ration Sentinelle' and increased protection at exposed locations due to elevated terrorism threats", "action": "update_score"}

{"city_id": "London", "alert_type": "protests", "severity": "medium", "summary": "Major demonstrations occurred March 7-8 related to Middle East conflict, with 5,000-6,000 participants in anti-war protests and Iran-related demonstrations", "action": "add_incident"}

{"city_id": "Vienna", "alert_type": "protests", "severity": "medium", "summary": "Two major demonstrations March 7-8: anti-US/Israel actions and Iranian human rights protests, with up to 2,000 participants near US Embassy area", "action": "add_incident"}

{"city_id": "Madrid", "alert_type": "protests", "severity": "low", "summary": "International Women's Day demonstrations March 8 included anti-war messaging related to Middle East conflict alongside women's rights issues", "action": "add_incident"}

{"city_id": "Barcelona", "alert_type": "protests", "severity": "low", "summary": "International Women's Day demonstrations March 8 with anti-war slogans opposing Middle East conflict included alongside gender equality messaging", "action": "add_incident"}

{"city_id": "Rome", "alert_type": "protests", "severity": "low", "summary": "Student protests against government policies occurred across Italy including Rome, with demonstrations under 'No Meloni Day' banner", "action": "add_incident"}

{"city_id": "Athens", "alert_type": "protests", "severity": "medium", "summary": "Anti-war protesters gathered at US Embassy March 1 following Middle East strikes, with Iranian flags and anti-imperialist messaging", "action": "add_incident"}

{"city_id": "Stockholm", "alert_type": "protests", "severity": "low", "summary": "Pro-Iran demonstrations occurred March 7 with support for exiled crown prince amid ongoing Middle East conflict", "action": "add_incident"}

{"city_id": "Helsinki", "alert_type": "disease_outbreak", "severity": "medium", "summary": "CDC Level 2 travel advisory issued March 4 for enhanced precautions due to circulating poliovirus, requiring updated polio vaccination", "action": "update_score"}

{"city_id": "Munich", "alert_type": "disease_outbreak", "severity": "medium", "summary": "CDC Level 2 travel advisory issued March 4 for enhanced precautions due to circulating poliovirus, requiring updated polio vaccination", "action": "update_score"}

{"city_id": "Zurich", "alert_type": "transport_disruption", "severity": "medium", "summary": "European airports experiencing widespread disruption March 4-5 with 283 delays and 82 cancellations due to Middle East airspace closures affecting global routes", "action": "add_incident"}

{"city_id": "Amsterdam", "alert_type": "transport_disruption", "severity": "medium", "summary": "Schiphol Airport among European hubs hit by major disruptions March 4-5, with cascading delays from Middle East airspace restrictions", "action": "add_incident"}

{"city_id": "Chicago", "alert_type": "transport_disruption", "severity": "high", "summary": "O'Hare experiencing major disruptions with 2,934 flight disruptions March 3 due to TSA staffing issues from government shutdown entering Day 18", "action": "add_incident"}

{"city_id": "New York City", "alert_type": "transport_disruption", "severity": "high", "summary": "JFK Airport hit by major flight disruptions with 2,934 total US disruptions March 3, compounded by TSA reduced paychecks from government shutdown", "action": "add_incident"}

{"city_id": "Los Angeles", "alert_type": "protests", "severity": "medium", "summary": "Major anti-war rallies occurred in LA and other US cities following Middle East strikes, with coalition groups organizing demonstrations against military escalation", "action": "add_incident"}

{"city_id": "istanbul_turkey", "alert_type": "travel_advisory", "severity": "high", "summary": "Turkey travel advisory updated March 8-9, 2026. Level 2 maintained but new area restrictions added. Turkish airspace struck by Iranian missile March 4. Southeast Turkey travel ban due to Iran conflict. U.S. government staff subject to travel restrictions since February 28.", "action": "update_score"}

{"city_id": "cancun_mexico", "alert_type": "major_crime", "severity": "critical", "summary": "Widespread cartel violence erupted Feb 22-23 following death of El Mencho drug lord. U.S. Embassy issued shelter-in-place orders for Quintana Roo (Cancun area). Flight cancellations, tourist disruptions. 89+ killed including 25 soldiers. Violence ongoing with power vacuum in CJNG cartel.", "action": "emergency_content"}

{"city_id": "mexico_city_mexico", "alert_type": "major_crime", "severity": "critical", "summary": "Major cartel violence following El Mencho killing Feb 22. Nationwide attacks, arson, highway blockades in multiple states. U.S. Embassy crisis hotline activated. Shelter-in-place orders issued. Transportation disrupted.", "action": "emergency_content"}

{"city_id": "playa_del_carmen_mexico", "alert_type": "major_crime", "severity": "critical", "summary": "Quintana Roo affected by widespread cartel violence following El Mencho death. U.S. Embassy shelter-in-place advisory active for region. Tourist areas impacted with transportation and flight disruptions.", "action": "emergency_content"}

{"city_id": "london_united_kingdom", "alert_type": "protests", "severity": "medium", "summary": "Large-scale Iranian diaspora protests March 7, 2026. 5,000-6,000 attended anti-war march with 'Hands Off Iran' theme. Also pro-monarchy demonstrations. Generally peaceful but significant crowds in central London.", "action": "add_incident"}

{"city_id": "paris_france", "alert_type": "protests", "severity": "medium", "summary": "Two competing Iranian diaspora demonstrations March 7. Pro-monarchy supporters vs. anti-monarchy protesters. Some carrying photos of exiled crown prince. Generally peaceful but tensions between opposing groups.", "action": "add_incident"}

{"city_id": "berlin_germany", "alert_type": "protests", "severity": "medium", "summary": "Iranian diaspora protests March 7 supporting exiled crown prince Reza Pahlavi. Part of coordinated Europe-wide demonstrations related to Iran conflict. Peaceful gatherings.", "action": "add_incident"}

{"city_id": "stockholm_sweden", "alert_type": "protests", "severity": "medium", "summary": "Iranian diaspora protests March 7 in solidarity with Iranian people amid ongoing Iran war. Pro-monarchy demonstrations supporting Reza Pahlavi.", "action": "add_incident"}

{"city_id": "rome_italy", "alert_type": "natural_disaster", "severity": "medium", "summary": "Campi Flegrei volcano near Naples showing increased activity March 2. 13 earthquakes up to magnitude 3.0 recorded in 24 hours. Depths as shallow as 20 meters suggest possible eruption risk. Enhanced monitoring warranted.", "action": "add_incident"}

{"city_id": "manila_philippines", "alert_type": "natural_disaster", "severity": "medium", "summary": "Increased volcanic activity at nearby volcanoes. Mayon Volcano at Alert Level 3 with ongoing lava flows and strombolian activity. Bulusan showing increased seismicity as of March 2. Enhanced monitoring in effect.", "action": "add_incident"}

{"city_id": "tel_aviv_israel", "alert_type": "travel_advisory", "severity": "critical", "summary": "Major ongoing conflict with Iran. Israeli airspace closed February 28, limited reopening March 8. U.S. consular services suspended through March 13. Missile strikes continue.", "action": "emergency_content"}

{"city_id": "istanbul_turkey", "alert_type": "travel_advisory", "severity": "high", "summary": "U.S. ordered non-emergency staff to depart Consulate Adana March 9. Heightened terrorism risk and armed conflict in southeast region due to Iran hostilities.", "action": "update_score"}

{"city_id": "abu_dhabi_uae", "alert_type": "conflict", "severity": "critical", "summary": "Iranian missile and drone strikes hit UAE airports and infrastructure. U.S. Embassy closed, shelter-in-place active. Limited flights only with confirmed tickets.", "action": "emergency_content"}

{"city_id": "doha_qatar", "alert_type": "conflict", "severity": "critical", "summary": "Airspace closed, Hamad International Airport suspended operations. NEW WARNING: Iranian proxies may specifically target Americans. Consular services suspended.", "action": "emergency_content"}

{"city_id": "cancun_mexico", "alert_type": "crime_violence", "severity": "high", "summary": "Major cartel violence following El Mencho killing February 22. U.S. State Department urges Americans to shelter in place. Flight disruptions at tourist destinations.", "action": "add_incident"}

{"city_id": "playa_del_carmen_mexico", "alert_type": "crime_violence", "severity": "high", "summary": "Ongoing cartel violence and roadblocks following El Mencho killing. Multiple states affected with narco-blockades and arson attacks. Travel disruptions continue.", "action": "add_incident"}

{"city_id": "mexico_city_mexico", "alert_type": "crime_violence", "severity": "medium", "summary": "Widespread cartel violence across Mexico following drug lord killing. Enhanced security measures in place. Some flight cancellations reported.", "action": "add_incident"}

{"city_id": "brussels_belgium", "alert_type": "transport_disruption", "severity": "high", "summary": "Major nationwide strike planned March 12. Brussels Airport expects to cancel ALL departing flights due to security/baggage handler walkouts.", "action": "add_incident"}

{"city_id": "rome_italy", "alert_type": "protests", "severity": "medium", "summary": "Pro-U.S./Israel and anti-U.S./Palestine demonstrations planned March 7 in Milan with 1000-1500 expected participants. Heightened tensions around U.S. facilities.", "action": "add_incident"}

{"city_id": "kuala_lumpur_malaysia", "alert_type": "natural_disaster", "severity": "medium", "summary": "Recent 7.1 magnitude earthquake February 23 in Sabah region. Multiple significant earthquakes recorded across Southeast Asia. Ongoing monitoring of aftershocks.", "action": "add_incident"}

{"city_id": "bali_indonesia", "alert_type": "natural_disaster", "severity": "medium", "summary": "Multiple active volcanoes at elevated alert levels. Recent flooding and wind disasters across Java and Bali. 18 fatalities, 84K people affected in recent weather events.", "action": "add_incident"}

{"city_id": "hanoi_vietnam", "alert_type": "natural_disaster", "severity": "low", "summary": "Storm and wind incidents reported in Quang Ngai province. Regional weather warnings for wetter conditions across Southeast Asia.", "action": "add_incident"}

{"city_id": "tel_aviv_israel", "alert_type": "travel_advisory", "severity": "critical", "summary": "US Embassy offering bus service to Egyptian border for American citizens. Commercial flights expected to resume March 8 but consular services suspended through March 13. Ongoing military conflict with Iran affecting safety.", "action": "update_score"}

{"city_id": "abu_dhabi_uae", "alert_type": "travel_advisory", "severity": "high", "summary": "UAE elevated to Level 3 Reconsider Travel. Shelter-in-place status due to Iranian retaliations. Dubai and Abu Dhabi airports reopened with limited operations after closures. Over 20,000 travelers stranded.", "action": "update_score"}

{"city_id": "doha_qatar", "alert_type": "transport_disruption", "severity": "high", "summary": "Hamad International Airport and Qatari airspace remain closed. Qatar Airways flights suspended through Friday. Americans advised to shelter in place.", "action": "emergency_content"}

{"city_id": "bali_indonesia", "alert_type": "natural_disaster", "severity": "medium", "summary": "INVEST 90S weather system causing heavy rainfall, strong winds, flooding and landslides across Java and Bali regions through March 2-8. 18 fatalities, 10 missing, 29 injured reported.", "action": "add_incident"}

{"city_id": "hanoi_vietnam", "alert_type": "natural_disaster", "severity": "low", "summary": "Storms and winds reported in Quang Ngai region as part of broader Southeast Asia weather pattern affecting Vietnam.", "action": "add_incident"}

{"city_id": "kuala_lumpur_malaysia", "alert_type": "natural_disaster", "severity": "low", "summary": "Medium to high 7-day average rainfall affecting Malaysia as part of regional weather pattern through March 9.", "action": "add_incident"}

{"city_id": "amsterdam_netherlands", "alert_type": "political_unrest", "severity": "low", "summary": "Anti-Iran regime protests March 7 along city canals with Israeli, American and pre-revolution Iran flags. Peaceful demonstration calling for Iranian embassy closure.", "action": "add_incident"}

{"city_id": "london_united_kingdom", "alert_type": "political_unrest", "severity": "low", "summary": "5,000-6,000 person 'Hands Off Iran' anti-war march on March 7. Some counter-demonstrations in support of Iranian government. Protests remained peaceful.", "action": "add_incident"}

{"city_id": "berlin_germany", "alert_type": "political_unrest", "severity": "low", "summary": "Pro-Pahlavi demonstrations March 7 supporting exiled Iranian crown prince. Part of Europe-wide protests amid Iran conflict.", "action": "add_incident"}

{"city_id": "istanbul_turkey", "alert_type": "travel_advisory", "severity": "high", "summary": "Turkey travel advisory updated March 8, 2026. US government employees subject to travel restrictions in southeastern Turkey due to heightened risks following US-Iran hostilities. NATO air defenses destroyed Iranian ballistic missile headed into Turkish airspace March 4.", "action": "update_score"}

{"city_id": "abu_dhabi_uae", "alert_type": "travel_advisory", "severity": "critical", "summary": "UAE escalated to shelter-in-place status as of March 8, 2026. US Embassy and Consulate closed. Limited commercial flights with restricted airport access to confirmed ticket holders only. Previously under Reconsider Travel advisory.", "action": "emergency_content"}

{"city_id": "tel_aviv_israel", "alert_type": "travel_advisory", "severity": "critical", "summary": "US Embassy Jerusalem suspended routine consular services through March 13, 2026 (extended one week). Shelter-in-place for Israel, West Bank and Gaza. Limited outbound flights resumed March 8 from Ben Gurion Airport.", "action": "emergency_content"}

{"city_id": "brussels_belgium", "alert_type": "transport_disruption", "severity": "critical", "summary": "National strike March 12, 2026 will cancel ALL departing flights from Brussels Airport. 24-hour walkout by all major union confederations affecting rail, public transport, and aviation. Strike impacts March 8-12 with rail disruptions starting early.", "action": "add_incident"}

{"city_id": "amsterdam_netherlands", "alert_type": "protests", "severity": "medium", "summary": "Pro-Iran monarchy and pro-democracy protests March 7, 2026 with demonstrators marching along city canals. Related to ongoing Iran conflict. Protests generally peaceful but may cause local traffic disruptions.", "action": "add_incident"}

{"city_id": "playa_del_carmen_mexico", "alert_type": "cartel_violence", "severity": "high", "summary": "Cartel retaliation violence Feb 22-23, 2026 following death of CJNG leader 'El Mencho'. Cars and businesses set on fire in Playa del Carmen, Cancun and Tulum. 6-7 arrests made in PDC. Violence has since subsided but elevated security remains.", "action": "update_score"}

{"city_id": "mexico_city_mexico", "alert_type": "travel_advisory", "severity": "medium", "summary": "Mexico Level 2 travel advisory remains in effect following nationwide cartel violence wave Feb 22-26. Popular tourist areas including Mexico City largely unaffected but travelers advised to exercise increased caution.", "action": "update_score"}

{"city_id": "new_delhi_india", "alert_type": "protests", "severity": "medium", "summary": "Multiple protests in New Delhi March 2-7, 2026. Anti-Iran killing demonstrations and ongoing pollution protests at India Gate area. 17 arrests made during pollution protests with some violence reported between protesters and police.", "action": "add_incident"}

{"city_id": "hanoi_vietnam", "alert_type": "disease_outbreak", "severity": "medium", "summary": "Vietnam included in CDC global dengue outbreak advisory updated March 2026. Dengue is year-round risk with outbreaks occurring every 2-5 years. Travelers should prevent mosquito bites.", "action": "add_incident"}

{"city_id": "cape_town_south_africa", "alert_type": "crime_update", "severity": "medium", "summary": "Cape Town Crime Index 2026 ranks city 16th globally with crime score 73.7. Recent violent attacks reported on hiking trails including Table Mountain, Lion's Head and Signal Hill. UK gov warns of attacks on secondary roads to/from Cape Town airport.", "action": "update_score"}

{"city_id": "tel_aviv_israel", "alert_type": "armed_conflict", "severity": "critical", "summary": "Ongoing Iranian missile and drone strikes targeting Tel Aviv. Multiple casualties reported including deaths from cluster bomb strikes. UNESCO World Heritage sites damaged. US Embassy suspended consular services and advised Americans to shelter in place. Airport operating limited flights.", "action": "emergency_content"}

{"city_id": "abu_dhabi_uae", "alert_type": "transport_disruption", "severity": "high", "summary": "UAE airspace partially closed with major flight cancellations and disruptions at Abu Dhabi Airport. Etihad Airways operating very limited schedule through March 19. Iranian missile strikes reported at airport infrastructure.", "action": "update_score"}

{"city_id": "dubai_uae", "alert_type": "transport_disruption", "severity": "high", "summary": "Dubai airports experienced complete closure March 1-2, now operating limited flights. Emirates running reduced schedule. Multiple airline suspensions including British Airways canceling service until end of year. Access restricted to confirmed passengers only.", "action": "update_score"}

{"city_id": "nassau_bahamas", "alert_type": "crime_wave", "severity": "medium", "summary": "Nassau maintains high violent crime rates with particular concerns in Over-the-Hill area south of Shirley Street where gang violence has killed residents. Armed robberies, sexual assaults targeting tourists in resort areas and cruise terminals.", "action": "add_incident"}

{"city_id": "madrid_spain", "alert_type": "protests", "severity": "low", "summary": "Large demonstrations on International Women's Day March 8 with thousands protesting violence against women and Middle East war. Multiple cities affected including Madrid, Barcelona, Seville, Granada.", "action": "add_incident"}

{"city_id": "barcelona_spain", "alert_type": "protests", "severity": "low", "summary": "International Women's Day demonstrations March 8 with protesters expressing solidarity with war-affected women and denouncing Middle East conflict.", "action": "add_incident"}

{"city_id": "seville_spain", "alert_type": "protests", "severity": "low", "summary": "International Women's Day protests March 8 among multiple Spanish cities with demonstrations against violence and war.", "action": "add_incident"}

{"city_id": "granada_spain", "alert_type": "protests", "severity": "low", "summary": "International Women's Day demonstrations March 8 with protesters denouncing violence against women and Middle East conflict.", "action": "add_incident"}

{"city_id": "brussels_belgium", "alert_type": "protests", "severity": "low", "summary": "Protest scheduled for March 8 with traffic adaptations from 2pm to 4pm in Brussels city center.", "action": "add_incident"}

{"city_id": "milan_italy", "alert_type": "protests", "severity": "low", "summary": "Authorized demonstrations March 7 at Piazza Castello (pro-US/Israel groups 2-5pm) and anti-US/pro-Palestine march (3-6pm) from Piazza della Scala to US Consulate. 1000-1500 participants expected.", "action": "add_incident"}

{"city_id": "rome_italy", "alert_type": "protests", "severity": "low", "summary": "Demonstration scheduled March 3 at 6pm at US Embassy (Via Bissolati/Via Veneto corner) protesting US government actions in Iran.", "action": "add_incident"}

{"city_id": "tel_aviv_israel", "alert_type": "armed_conflict", "severity": "critical", "summary": "US-Israeli strikes on Iran since Feb 28 have triggered Iranian retaliation with missiles and drones targeting Israeli cities. US Embassy in Jerusalem remains closed, government staff sheltering in place. Ben Gurion Airport experiencing significant disruptions.", "action": "emergency_content"}

{"city_id": "abu_dhabi_uae", "alert_type": "terrorism_incident", "severity": "critical", "summary": "Iranian drone strike hit Zayed International Airport on March 7, killing 1 person and injuring 7. Airport operating with limited flights. Ongoing Iranian retaliation for US-Israeli strikes on Iran.", "action": "update_score"}

{"city_id": "dubai_uae", "alert_type": "terrorism_incident", "severity": "critical", "summary": "Dubai International Airport hit by Iranian drone strike March 7, causing temporary closure and 4 injuries. Airport now operating limited flights. Multiple strikes across UAE including Fairmont Hotel on Palm Jumeirah.", "action": "update_score"}

{"city_id": "nassau_bahamas", "alert_type": "airspace_closure", "severity": "high", "summary": "Bahrain International Airport closed due to regional conflict. Flight disruptions affecting Caribbean connections via Middle Eastern hubs.", "action": "add_incident"}

{"city_id": "playa_del_carmen_mexico", "alert_type": "cartel_violence", "severity": "high", "summary": "Major cartel violence following killing of CJNG leader 'El Mencho' on Feb 22. Mexican government deployed 10,000 personnel to Quintana Roo. Situation stabilized as of Feb 26 but heightened security remains.", "action": "update_score"}

{"city_id": "mexico_city_mexico", "alert_type": "cartel_violence", "severity": "medium", "summary": "Nationwide cartel violence with roadblocks and vehicle fires following El Mencho's death. Federal government maintains increased security presence. CJNG succession crisis may cause continued instability.", "action": "add_incident"}

{"city_id": "london_uk", "alert_type": "protest", "severity": "medium", "summary": "Metropolitan Police banned Al Quds Day march scheduled for March 16 due to public disorder risks. Static protest still planned. Multiple counter-protests expected relating to Middle East conflict.", "action": "add_incident"}

{"city_id": "new_york_usa", "alert_type": "protest", "severity": "medium", "summary": "Anti-Iran strike protests and anti-ICE demonstrations with multiple arrests. Violent clashes reported outside Gracie Mansion on March 10 with pepper spray incidents.", "action": "add_incident"}

{"city_id": "bali_indonesia", "alert_type": "transport_disruption", "severity": "medium", "summary": "Over 1,600 tourists stranded at I Gusti Ngurah Rai Airport due to Middle East airspace closures affecting connecting flights through Dubai/Qatar hubs.", "action": "add_incident"}

{"city_id": "Tel Aviv", "alert_type": "armed_conflict", "severity": "critical", "summary": "Ongoing Israel-Iran conflict with active missile strikes. Latest reports show multiple overnight missile barrages from Iran targeting central Israel including Tel Aviv area, with sirens at 11:30 PM, 12:50 AM, 3:40 AM, and 4:40 AM. US Embassy suspended routine services until March 13 and is offering evacuation assistance to Egyptian border. Israeli fatalities confirmed from recent strikes.", "action": "emergency_content"}

{"city_id": "Abu Dhabi", "alert_type": "travel_advisory", "severity": "high", "summary": "UAE elevated to Level 3 travel advisory by US State Department due to regional conflict escalation. American Airlines issuing travel waivers for flights through March 29. Airspace disruptions affecting commercial aviation in Persian Gulf region.", "action": "update_score"}

{"city_id": "Bali Indonesia", "alert_type": "natural_disaster", "severity": "high", "summary": "Extreme weather emergency alert until March 8, 2026. Cyclone Seed 90S causing severe flooding, landslides across Bali including tourist areas. Airport ceiling collapse at international terminal. Major tourist zones including Kuta, Legian, Sanur, Denpasar affected by flooding with water levels reaching 30-80cm. Wave heights up to 5 meters threatening coastal areas.", "action": "update_score"}

{"city_id": "Hanoi Vietnam", "alert_type": "natural_disaster", "severity": "medium", "summary": "Part of broader Southeast Asia weather system with storms and winds reported in Quang Ngai province. Regional weather warnings for heavy rainfall and flooding across Vietnam through early March 2026.", "action": "add_incident"}

{"city_id": "London", "alert_type": "political_unrest", "severity": "medium", "summary": "London Metropolitan Police banned Al Quds Day march for first time since 2012, citing 'extreme tensions' and potential for serious disorder. Extra officers deployed from across country for 'challenging, potentially violent weekend'. Counter-terrorism arrests related to Iranian regime activities reported.", "action": "add_incident"}

{"city_id": "tel_aviv_israel", "alert_type": "transport_disruption", "severity": "high", "summary": "Ben Gurion Airport experiencing massive flight disruptions with 85 cancellations and 8 delays on March 11, 2026. Major international routes affected due to ongoing Middle East conflict. Limited repatriation flights operating.", "action": "update_score"}

{"city_id": "abu_dhabi_uae", "alert_type": "conflict", "severity": "critical", "summary": "US State Department ordered non-emergency personnel evacuation due to armed conflict threat. Embassy closed, shelter-in-place orders issued. Limited commercial flights operating with restrictions.", "action": "emergency_content"}

{"city_id": "playa_del_carmen_mexico", "alert_type": "civil_unrest", "severity": "medium", "summary": "Recent security operations with roadblocks and criminal activity in Mexico (Feb 22-23, 2026). Situation has normalized in Quintana Roo state but US Embassy issued spring break travel advisory for heightened caution.", "action": "add_incident"}

{"city_id": "mexico_city_mexico", "alert_type": "civil_unrest", "severity": "medium", "summary": "Recent security operations with roadblocks and explosions on highways connecting to Mexico City (Feb 22-23, 2026). Situation has since stabilized but travelers advised to exercise increased caution.", "action": "add_incident"}

{"city_id": "hanoi_vietnam", "alert_type": "natural_disaster", "severity": "low", "summary": "Vietnam preparing enhanced disaster response capabilities for 2026 typhoon season (June-November). {"city_id": "cape_town_south_africa", "alert_type": "infrastructure", "severity": "medium", "summary": "Cape Town International Airport experienced fire incident causing flight disruptions and evacuations. Increased security concerns on secondary roads to/from airport. General high crime environment continues.", "action": "add_incident"}

{"city_id": "Tel Aviv", "alert_type": "active_conflict", "severity": "critical", "summary": "Ongoing U.S.-Israeli military operations against Iran. US and Israeli strikes have killed over 1,300 people in Iran. Iranian counter-attacks targeting Israel continue. Travel advisory Level 3 warning active.", "action": "emergency_content"}

{"city_id": "Antalya", "alert_type": "earthquake", "severity": "medium", "summary": "Magnitude 5.3 earthquake struck 75km southeast of Samsun at 03:35 local time on March 13, 2026. Turkey experiences regular seismic activity. No immediate damage reports for tourist areas.", "action": "add_incident"}

{"city_id": "Bodrum", "alert_type": "earthquake", "severity": "medium", "summary": "Multiple earthquakes in Turkish coastal regions, including magnitude 3.3 earthquake in Aegean Sea near Marmaris on March 9. Ongoing seismic activity in earthquake-prone zone.", "action": "add_incident"}

{"city_id": "Corfu", "alert_type": "earthquake", "severity": "medium", "summary": "Magnitude 5.5 earthquake occurred 10km west of Io\u00e1nnina (Epirus) on March 8, 2026. Strongest earthquake in Greece in over 5 months. Aftershocks continuing in region.", "action": "add_incident"}

{"city_id": "Mykonos", "alert_type": "earthquake", "severity": "medium", "summary": "Magnitude 5.5 earthquake occurred 10km west of Io\u00e1nnina (Epirus) on March 8, 2026. Strongest earthquake in Greece in over 5 months. Aftershocks continuing in region.", "action": "add_incident"}

{"city_id": "Milan", "alert_type": "transport_disruption", "severity": "high", "summary": "Massive flight disruptions hit Italian airports on March 12, 2026. Milan-Malpensa and Milan-Linate severely affected with hundreds of cancellations. Staff shortages and weather issues cited as causes.", "action": "update_score"}

{"city_id": "Venice", "alert_type": "transport_disruption", "severity": "high", "summary": "Venice Marco Polo Airport affected by widespread Italian aviation disruptions on March 12. Weather-related delays and staffing issues causing significant flight cancellations and delays.", "action": "update_score"}
